_meta.description: Source of truth for all credentials. Tracks what SHOULD exist and metadata.

schema.name: human-readable identifier
schema.last_updated: ISO 8601 date when credential was last saved
schema.expiry_date: ISO 8601 date or null if no expiry
schema.required: true if system breaks without this
